sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Try LEFT from state 0
result = action(['LEFT'])
print(f"LEFT: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, no_impact={last_action_result.get('no_impact')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: boundary={n['boundary']}")
print(f"Current state: {state_graph.current}")

# Check for new states
all_states = set()
for sid in [0, 1, 8, 9, 10, 11]:
    all_states.add(sid)
    for neighbor_id, action_name in state_graph.neighbors(sid):
        all_states.add(neighbor_id)
print(f"All states: {sorted(all_states)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
